steps.title: Use the hoax context
steps.content: The text describes Wikipedia hoaxes and fictitious entries that stayed online for years before being recognized and deleted. The missing word should mean false creations.

steps.title: Reject positive or neutral nouns
steps.content: Choice A means studies or explanations, not false entries. Choice C means improvements. Choice D means surprising disclosures. None captures the idea of made-up encyclopedia entries. The answer is B.
